MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Daniel Lee, is present. Represented by Carol Carlsgrove
Attorney, Cindy Lee, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Sarah Sweeting, is present.
Attorney, Umung Varma , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-22-2010 is vacated.
